issues.description: Counter effect must use trigger 'Counter', not 'OnAttacked'
Second action 'Rest' on opponent characters is completely wrong. Text says 'set up to 1 of your Characters as active' which means Rest your own character, not opponent's
Second effect object is entirely incorrect. No mention of +2000 power to leader for EndOfTurn in official text. This effect should not exist
Target scope should allow Leader or Character; 'ChooseOwnCharacter' excludes Leader. Should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' or equivalent
